nasb.text: For just like the lightning, when it flashes out of one part of the sky, shines to the other part of the sky, so will the Son of Man be in His day.

esv.text: For as the lightning flashes and lights up the sky from one side to the other, so will the Son of Man be in his day.

cnv.text: 電光怎樣從天這邊一閃，直照到天那邊，人子在他的日子也是這樣。

ccb.text: 因为人子降临的时候必如划过长空的闪电，从天这边一直照亮到天那边。

csbs.text: 因为就像闪电一闪，从天这边照耀到天那边，人子在他的日子也将要这样。
